Our Portfolio

A showcase of the events we’ve brought to life — each one thoughtfully planned and filled with handcrafted decor made with love.

Garden Reception

Outdoor ceremony with a handmade floral archway, lush greenery, and intimate garden seating.

Bridal Shower — Blush & Gold Replace with event photo

Blush & Gold

Elegant bridal shower with custom centerpieces, hand-lettered signage, and a curated dessert display.

Baby Shower — Woodland Theme Replace with event photo

Woodland Theme

Whimsical woodland baby shower featuring handcrafted animal figurines, mossy accents, and earthy tones.

Wedding — Rustic Barn Replace with event photo

Rustic Barn

Rustic venue transformed with handcrafted wooden signage, mason jar arrangements, and string lights.

Casual Party — 50th Birthday Replace with event photo

50th Birthday Celebration

Milestone celebration with personalized decor, a custom photo wall, and elegant table settings.

Baby Shower — Oh Baby! Replace with event photo

Oh Baby!

Modern baby shower with balloon installations, a minimalist color palette, and chic tabletop details.

Bridal Shower — Garden Party Replace with event photo

Garden Party

Outdoor bridal shower with a lush floral wall, hand-tied bouquets, and pastel table linens.

Wedding — Classic Elegance Replace with event photo

Classic Elegance

Black-tie reception with crystal centerpieces, candlelit tablescapes, and timeless floral arrangements.

Casual Party — Backyard BBQ Replace with event photo

Backyard BBQ

Styled backyard celebration with rustic charm, picnic-inspired seating, and handmade pennant banners.

Custom — Corporate Gala Replace with event photo

Corporate Gala

Branded event with bespoke decor, custom signage, and a polished atmosphere tailored to the company’s vision.

Wedding — Boho Beach Replace with event photo

Boho Beach

Beachside ceremony with macrame details, driftwood accents, and flowing fabric draped under open skies.

Baby Shower — Twinkle Twinkle Replace with event photo

Twinkle Twinkle

Starry-themed shower with handmade garlands, celestial accents, and a dreamy midnight-blue palette.

We’d love to hear about your vision and start designing something unforgettable together.

Handcrafted event planning and custom decor. Based on Long Island, NY — serving all 50 states.
